api: Clazar REST API (https://api.clazar.io, reference at https://developers.clazar.io/reference)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion, re-researched against the live developers.clazar.io reference (llms.txt index + per-endpoint pages fetched 2026-07-04): Clazar's REST surface is a compact, fully-enumerable resource set (buyers, listings, contracts, opportunities, private offers, reseller offers, contacts, metering records, one analytics-dataset passthrough endpoint, plus the OAuth2 token endpoint). Every endpoint below is either implemented as a stream/write or excluded with a specific, real reason -- there is no remaining 'Pass B' catch-all bucket. New in this pass: 3 read streams (reseller_offers, contacts, metering) and 10 write actions (update_buyer, update_opportunity, update_private_offer, update_contract, activate_contract, create_contact, update_contact, delete_contact, update_metering_record, create_metering_records); capabilities.write flips true.

excluded.reason: OAuth2 client_credentials token exchange, not a syncable object stream; already wired declaratively as this bundle's auth.token_url
single-buyer detail; identical record shape to the buyers list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-listing detail; identical record shape to the listings list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-contract detail; identical record shape to the contracts list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-opportunity detail; identical record shape to the opportunities list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-private-offer detail; identical record shape to the private_offers list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-reseller-offer detail; identical record shape to the reseller_offers list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

documented reseller_offers update accepts only custom_properties/external_object_associations, an identical shape to update_private_offer/update_buyer already covered; excluded for breadth-vs-cost triage rather than adding a 6th near-duplicate action this pass
single-contact detail; identical record shape to the contacts list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-metering-record detail; identical record shape to the metering list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

polymorphic pre-aggregated analytics dataset whose response shape varies per dataset_name (AWS/Azure/GCP marketplace reporting cuts) with no single fixed schema; a distinct per-dataset stream per dataset_name would be needed to model it safely, deferred as breadth-vs-cost triage
